requirement_text: The RTI shall expose federation-management information through the standard Management Object Model using OMT-defined object classes, attributes, interaction classes, parameters, datatypes, and semantics.
packet_verification_method: requirements review + MOM observer test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The FDD for every federation execution shall include the standard MOM definitions needed by conforming MOM subscribers and requestors.
packet_verification_method: FDD static validation
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The implementation shall not revise the predefined standard MOM object classes, interaction classes, attributes, parameters, datatypes, or semantics, except by standard-compatible extension.
packet_verification_method: MIM static diff test
notes: Current repo-native MIM merge tests directly prove that standard MOM definitions and catalog metadata are preserved without revision, while still allowing standard-compatible extension.

requirement_text: RTI shall expose standard management information through MOM object and interaction classes.
packet_verification_method: design review + integration test
notes: This imported MOM overview row is directly covered by the current MOM observer and catalog validation evidence.

requirement_text: The RTI shall publish standard MOM object classes and attributes designated as RTI-published in the MIM.
packet_verification_method: MOM publication test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall register and maintain one standard MOM federation object instance representing the federation execution.
packet_verification_method: MOM observer integration test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall register, update, and remove one standard MOM federate object instance for each joined federate according to join/resign/lost-federate lifecycle state.
packet_verification_method: join/resign MOM observer test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall update MOM object attributes when the represented management state changes or when periodic/update-rate requirements apply.
packet_verification_method: MOM attribute reflection test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: RTI shall publish standard MOM object classes and maintain MOM federation/federate object instances.
packet_verification_method: design review + integration test
notes: This imported MOM object overview row is directly covered by the current standard MIM object discovery and federate/federation lifecycle evidence.

requirement_text: The implementation shall permit standard-compatible MOM extension by subclassing or adding attributes without changing standard MOM definitions.
packet_verification_method: extension FOM validation test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall not subscribe to standard MOM object classes as an ordinary federate subscriber.
packet_verification_method: static design review
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall not divest ownership of the standard attributes of its MOM object instances.
packet_verification_method: ownership negative test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall implement MOM interaction roles for requests, reports, adjustments, and service invocations according to the standard MOM interaction hierarchy.
packet_verification_method: MOM interaction integration test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: When a valid MOM request interaction is received, the RTI shall generate the corresponding MOM report interaction where the standard defines a report response.
packet_verification_method: request/report integration test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: When a valid MOM adjustment interaction is received, the RTI shall adjust the corresponding MOM reporting or management setting according to the standard semantics.
packet_verification_method: adjustment interaction test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: When a valid MOM service interaction requests an HLA service on behalf of a federate and all standard conditions are satisfied, the RTI shall invoke the corresponding service behavior.
packet_verification_method: service interaction test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: RTI shall process standard MOM request, adjustment, report, and service interactions according to their role.
packet_verification_method: design review + integration test
notes: This imported MOM interaction overview row is directly covered by the current request/report, adjust, and service-action evidence.

requirement_text: The RTI shall publish standard MOM report interactions at leaf interaction-class level where required.
packet_verification_method: MOM publication static test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall ignore nonstandard added parameters in received MOM interactions when processing the standard MOM portion of the interaction.
packet_verification_method: extension compatibility test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall apply the MOM-specific RTI characteristics defined by the standard rather than treating itself as a normal joined federate.
packet_verification_method: requirements review
notes: Current repo-native MOM runtime tests directly prove the RTI-specific Clause 11 characteristics as one coherent contract: no RTI-side joined federate, no hidden subscriptions, receive-order reliable MOM traffic without time metadata, and DDM rejection for MOM classes.

requirement_text: The RTI shall publish all standard MOM leaf object and interaction classes designated as RTI-published.
packet_verification_method: MIM publication static test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall subscribe to standard MOM leaf interaction classes designated as RTI-subscribed.
packet_verification_method: MIM subscription static test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall be neither time-regulating nor time-constrained for MOM traffic.
packet_verification_method: MOM time-state negative test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall not provide timestamps or retraction handles for MOM messages unless a standard-specific exception applies.
packet_verification_method: MOM timestamp negative test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall not use DDM services with MOM except where the standard specifically defines DDM use.
packet_verification_method: MOM DDM negative test
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall not modify the standard transportation or order type of MOM attributes or interactions.
packet_verification_method: MIM static validation
notes: Current repo-native MOM tests directly exercise this packet slice.

requirement_text: The RTI shall determine service-reporting behavior for each federate from the applicable MOM service-reporting switch state.
